phase_name: Inter-stage Pydantic validation + robust candidate handoff

completed_phases.name: Transaction cost fix (0.3% → 0.6% TWSE / 0.7% TPEx)
completed_phases.summary: Replaced flat 0.3% commission with market-specific round-trip costs. TWSE 0.6%, TPEx 0.7%. Added _is_tpex() and _get_transaction_cost() helpers. Updated all 3 P&L paths. Verified via Z.ai review.

completed_phases.name: Data quality threshold fix (50-day → 240-day min for 300-day SMA)
completed_phases.summary: Changed data quality gate from 50-day to 240-day minimum (one full trading year). Below 240 days = low confidence, 240-270 = medium, 270+ = high. Fixed variable naming (min_days_50 → max_history_days).

completed_phases.name: Corporate action backward-adjustment engine
completed_phases.summary: Full backward-adjustment engine. 401 stocks with corporate action data. Adjustment formula: (close - cash_div) / (1 + stock_div/100). All historical OHLCV adjusted backward from ex-date. Downstream modules (regime_detector, stage1_screen) now use adj_close. Price history lookback increased to 365 days. ROC date conversion helpers.

completed_phases.name: Tiered regime system (NORMAL→CAUTION→STRESS→CRISIS→BLACK_SWAN)
completed_phases.summary: Replaced 3-regime system with 5-tier system. BLACK_SWAN bypasses 5-day freeze for emergency exits. Position sizing: normal=1.0x, caution=0.6x, stress=0.3x, crisis=0.1x, black_swan=0.0x. Updated regime_rules.json, telegram_alerts.py emoji mapping. Config version bumped to 4.0.

completed_phases.name: Survivorship bias Tier 1 (12% return haircut)
completed_phases.summary: Added 12% return haircut and 8% win rate haircut to backtest results to account for delisted stocks not in dataset. Reports both raw and adjusted metrics (avg_pnl_pct_adj, win_rate_adj). Tier 2 (scrape delisted stocks) pending.

completed_phases.name: Sector refinement (12-15 sub-sectors + correlation matrix)
completed_phases.summary: Split 'technology' (9 industry codes) into 6 sub-sectors: semiconductor, electronics, optoelectronics, communications, computers, components. Added correlation matrix and sector concentration checks. Max 25% per sector.

completed_phases.name: Conditional weight smoothing (avoid flash-trade triggers)
completed_phases.summary: Added weight smoothing to limit per-day weight changes to 5%. Saves previous day's weights and interpolates on regime transitions. Updated weights.json to v4.0 with new regime names.

completed_phases.name: Regime freeze exemption for volatility shocks
completed_phases.summary: Already implemented in Phase 3. BLACK_SWAN regime bypasses 5-day min duration, allowing immediate emergency exits during extreme volatility events.

completed_phases.name: Survivorship Bias Tier 2: Holiday calendar, Pydantic schema enforcement
completed_phases.summary: Full holiday calendar with cross-year loading, half-day sessions, make-up workdays. Pydantic schemas for all data types with extra='forbid' on internal schemas. Validation at ingestion boundary reduced errors from 44.5% → 0.2%. Fixed critical batch_validate() bug (normalize_keys broke aliases) and RevenueRecord schema mismatch.

completed_phases.name: Holiday-aware position sizing + post-holiday volatility spike detection
completed_phases.summary: Added HolidayCalendar integration to PaperTrader with graceful fallback. _is_post_holiday() detects first trading day after extended gaps (>3 calendar days). _get_holiday_risk_factor() reduces position size by 25-50% for upcoming long holiday gaps. ATR stop widening (+30%) on post-holiday days to avoid premature stop-outs during volatility spikes. Fixed critical weekend gap bug (threshold > 3 instead of > 0) and holiday_calendar.py NameError.

notes: Phase 0-10 done. Ready for next phase.

findings: Ex-date price should not be adjusted (already post-dividend)
Regime label mismatch: bull vs normal, stale 5-day holdover
Stage 2 zero candidates due to missing dividends/major_sh data loads
fixes_applied: Corporate action backward adjustment engine fixed (/10 divisor)
Two-pass approach for ex-date factor calc (day-before close)
Regime migration fix: old names force immediate transition
Added dividends + major_sh to load_data() optional datasets

items_addressed: Score quantization → continuous scoring (was only 2 unique div scores)
Stage 1 threshold tuning: market_cap NT\$50B→NT\$30B, adv NT\$100M→NT\$50M
Regime cross-check against TAIEX drawdown (verified crisis label)
Volume adjustment already applied from R4
